sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93086" key="sakkogeneiotro/fos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σακκο-γενειοτρόφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<sense id="n93086.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σάκκος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cherishing a huge beard</tr_>, Epigr. ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1392.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hegesand.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
